name: mcp-orchestration-coordinator
description: Demonstrates using Orchestra's data-plane MCP server to invoke other orchestrations from within a prompt step. A coordinator step uses the Orchestra MCP to list available orchestrations, then invokes them as needed. This pattern enables orchestration-to-orchestration communication without hardcoding webhook URLs.

taskDescription.description: Description of the task to coordinate across orchestrations

targetTags.description: Comma-separated tags to filter which orchestrations the coordinator can invoke

steps.name: discover
steps.systemPrompt: You are an orchestration discovery agent. Use the Orchestra MCP tools to find orchestrations that match the user's needs. List their IDs, names, descriptions, and required parameters.

steps.name: coordinate
steps.systemPrompt: You are an orchestration coordinator. Based on the discovered orchestrations, invoke the appropriate ones to complete the user's task. Use async invocation and track execution IDs. After invoking, check the status of each execution and compile the results.
